title: Rathbunia laevigata
taxonomy: Rathbunia laevigata is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Mutisieae and is part of the genus Rathbunia. Rathbunia laevigata is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The species is characterized by its smooth, hairy, and lobed leaves. Rathbunia laevigata is a relatively rare and understudied plant, but its classification highlights its unique characteristics within the Asteraceae family.
